dashboard.description: [English Version] Updated 2024.05.22, optimized important metric display. Rebuilt using Grafana 10 new styles, added health score concept, and added charts for overall resource consumption. Includes overall resource display and resource detail charts: CPU, Memory, Disk, IO, Network, etc. monitoring metrics. https://github.com/starsliao/TenSunS

panels.title: 🏡Resource Overview: Current JOB [$origin_prometheus: $job] Current Host [$show_name] Instance: $instance

panels.description:
Partition Usage, Disk Read, Disk Write, Download Bandwidth, Upload Bandwidth. If there are multiple network cards or partitions, the value of the network card or partition with the highest usage is collected.

Connections: CurrEstab - Current number of TCP connections in ESTABLISHED or CLOSE-WAIT state.

Health Score is a new metric calculated based on CPU, Memory, and IO. A value below 90 indicates that system resource usage requires attention. This is a metric under testing, and parameters may need to be optimized based on actual conditions.
panels.title: Server Resource Overview [Total Hosts: $total]

panels.description:
- P99：数据集按升序排列，第99分位置大的数据。（即升序排列后排在99%位置的数据）
- 该表格需要在Prometheus增加记录规则（参考看板下载页）
- 增加记录规则1小时后才会有展示的数据。
- 时间范围[7d:1h]表示要查看过去 7 天内每小时的数据点。
panels.title: P99 Resource Usage in Last 7 Days

panels.description:
In this dashboard: Disk Total, Used, Available, and Usage columns are consistent with the df command's Size, Used, Avail, and Use% columns, and the Use% value is rounded to one decimal place for greater accuracy.

Note: The df Use% algorithm is: (size - free) * 100 / (avail + (size - free)). If the result is an integer, that value is used; otherwise, it's that value + 1. The unit of the result is %.
Reference df command source code:
panels.title: [$show_name]: Partition Free Space (EXT.*/XFS/NFS)

matcher.options: Processes blocked waiting for IO completion

targets.legendFormat: Processes blocked waiting for IO completion

panels.title: File Descriptors (FD) / Context Switches per Second

panels.description:
Read time seconds: seconds spent on read operations per disk partition

Write time seconds: seconds spent on write operations per disk partition

IO time seconds: seconds spent on input/output operations per disk partition

IO time weighted seconds: weighted seconds spent on input/output operations per disk partition
panels.title: Time per IO Read/Write (Ref: <100ms)

panels.description:
Reads completed: Reads completed per second per disk partition

Writes completed: Writes completed per second per disk partition

IO now: Number of I/O requests currently being processed per second per disk partition
panels.title: Disk RW Rate (IOPS)

panels.description:
Read bytes: bytes read per second per disk partition
Written bytes: bytes written per second per disk partition
panels.title: Disk RW Capacity/s

panels.description:
Wall-clock time spent on I/O per second.

node_disk_io_time_seconds_total: Seconds spent by disk on input/output operations. This is a cumulative value. (Milliseconds Spent Doing I/Os)

irate(node_disk_io_time_seconds_total[1m]): Calculates the rate per second: (last value - previous last value) / timestamp difference, i.e., the proportion of time spent by disk on I/O operations within 1 second.

matcher.options: Idle - Waiting for something to happen

panels.title: Disk IO Time % (IO Util)

panels.description:
Sockets_used - Total number of sockets used across all protocols

CurrEstab - Number of TCP connections currently in ESTABLISHED or CLOSE-WAIT state

TCP_alloc - Number of allocated TCP sockets (established, sk_buff requested)

TCP_tw - Number of TCP connections waiting to close

UDP_inuse - Number of UDP sockets currently in use

RetransSegs - Number of TCP retransmitted segments

OutSegs - Number of TCP segments sent

InSegs - Number of TCP segments received
panels.title: Network Socket Info
